core_principles: Density with Clarity: Maximizing information per pixel without clutter.
Function over Form: Every element serves a data engineering purpose.
Trustworthy Precision: Aesthetics that imply accuracy and reliability.
Response & Feedback: Immediate visual confirmation for all data actions.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-transparent font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.dashboard_metric: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border p-6 rounded-md shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

glassmorphism.header: bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border sticky top-0 z-50

login_bg.usage: Login page background, subtle overlay opacity

hero_abstract.usage: Dashboard hero section or promotional banner

instructions_to_main_agent.layout_strategy: Use a sidebar layout for the main app. The sidebar should be collapsible. The main content area should have a max-width constraint for readability on huge screens but expand for tables.

page_specifics.dashboard: Implement a Bento Grid layout. Top row: Key Metrics (Files Processed, Pending Approvals, Storage Used). Middle row: Activity Chart (Bar chart using Shadcn/Recharts) spanning 2/3, Recent Activity List spanning 1/3. Bottom row: Quick Actions.
page_specifics.file_upload: Create a large, dashed-border dropzone area. Use 'react-dropzone'. Visual feedback on drag over. List uploaded files immediately below with progress bars.
page_specifics.mapping_editor: Split screen. Left: Source Fields (JSON/PDF keys). Right: Destination Schema (SQL columns). Center: Connection lines or mapping dropdowns. Use 'react-flow' if complex, or simple row-matching inputs for MVP.
page_specifics.approvals: Data table with status badges. Row click opens a detailed 'Diff' view or summary modal.

instructions_to_main_agent.data_visualization: Use 'recharts' via Shadcn Charts. customize tooltips to be clean and minimal.
instructions_to_main_agent.notifications: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications. Position: bottom-right.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text or backgrounds unless specified in 'visual_enhancers'.
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA minimum).
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all code, IDs, and data values.
Forms must use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for validation.
